fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).
fields.label: Schema
fields.name: schema_config

fields.description: Fields this transform requires in input. Used for DAG validation to catch missing field errors at config time. For templates, use elspeth.core.templates.extract_jinja2_fields() to discover fields.
fields.label: Required Input Fields
fields.name: required_input_fields

fields.description: Name of the field containing the number of copies to make
fields.label: Copies Field
fields.name: copies_field

fields.description: Default number of copies if copies_field is missing or invalid
fields.label: Default Copies
fields.name: default_copies

fields.description: Upper bound on copies per row to prevent unbounded replication
fields.label: Max Copies
fields.name: max_copies

fields.description: Whether to add a 'copy_index' field (0-based) to each output row
fields.label: Include Copy Index
fields.name: include_copy_index
